commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a browser-injected bounded response reader to the OpenAI Realtime WebRTC live smoke and tests unsafe decimal Content-Length rejection for SDP answer reads.

PR surface: Tests +24, Other +29. Total +53 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: on current main, an unsafe decimal Content-Length value falls through the safe-integer guard and can acquire the response body reader. I did not run Vitest or live smoke in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainer review should decide the exact-head live OpenAI WebRTC validation and draft status; no narrow automated code repair is identified.

target.title: fix(dev): bound realtime SDP answer reads
target.body:
## Summary

- Move the OpenAI Realtime WebRTC SDP answer fetch out of the browser-local helper and through a Node-side helper that reuses the shared bounded response reader.
- Preserve the browser peer setup path by exposing the SDP request helper to Playwright with `page.exposeFunction`.
- Add regression coverage for unsafe decimal `Content-Length` values on the SDP answer path.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: unsafe digit-only `Content-Length` values larger than JavaScript's safe integer range no longer make the realtime SDP answer reader enter a response body stream before rejecting.

Real environment tested: local sparse-worktree proof used syntax checks, direct before/after repros, diff sanity, and autoreview. Hosted exact-head proof is pending.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
- `node --check --experimental-strip-types scripts/dev/realtime-talk-live-smoke.ts`
- `node --check --experimental-strip-types test/scripts/dev-tooling-safety.test.ts`
- direct old browser-local reader repro for `content-length: 9007199254740993`
- direct shared bounded response repro for `content-length: 9007199254740993`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`

Evidence after fix: the patched path rejects with `OpenAI Realtime SDP answer response body exceeded 16 bytes`, does not start the response body reader, and cancels the response body.

Observed result after fix: `readStarted=false`, `canceled=true`; autoreview clean with overall patch correctness `0.84`.

What was not tested: focused Vitest was not run locally because this sparse GWT has no `node_modules`, and repo rules say not to install dependencies in Codex worktrees. Hosted exact-head proof will cover the broader gate.
target.author: vincentkoc
